title: Senior Doctor - Indraprastha Apollo - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Indraprastha Apollo - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
